case_title: LAMANCE, KEN VS TISHGART, KENNETH B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $651.25 FILED BY LAMANCE, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CON'T FILED. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER. $10. FEES PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-30-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-27-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM KENNETH TISHGART FILED AND SENT TO RM 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMANCE, KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B. $651.25 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $671.25, DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO TRANSFER IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT KENNETH B. TISHGART REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISS- IONER AFTER 15 DAYS.
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED 7/27/00 RETURNED DENIED BY THE COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN.ORDER SIGNED ON 8/23/00
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26392, RECORD TRANSFERRED
PLAINTIFF KEN LAMANCE DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMANCE, KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B. $651.25 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $671.25, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26392 ON 10-12-00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE REMANDED FROM APPELLATE DIV. WITHOUT FILE.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B.
PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION FILED. RE: DEFENDANT'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $709.90 AS TO DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B.
